name: Busy Bus USA
registry_source: Colorado Secretary of State (no confirmed match)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'Busy Bus USA' or 'Busy Bus'. The address 6284 S Galena Way, Englewood, CO 80111 is associated with two unrelated Colorado LLCs (Legacy Material Handling formed 6/1/2021 and Zee Printing LLC formed 12/8/2014, both registered to agent Steven Lytle). No Colorado SOS entity confirmed under the Busy Bus USA name; the address appears to be a residence/registered agent address rather than an active bus operating location. Unable to verify the company independently; possibly mis-classified, very small/dormant, or operating under a different legal name.

name: Amestoy Corp Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: California Secretary of State (Entity #C2231393); city-data.com mirror
notes: Full legal name is 'AMESTOY CORPORATION, WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS AMESTOY CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION' (the source list appears to have truncated the name at 'Bus...' which is actually 'Business'). Entity is a Utah-domiciled Foreign Stock Corporation registered in CA on 5/2/2000, ACTIVE. Address 8464 Goggin St, Valley Springs, CA 95252 matches. This is a construction company, NOT a school-bus/transportation operator. No matching FMCSA SAFER record exists for AMESTOY as a passenger or motor carrier. Likely a false positive in the source list due to the truncated entity name containing the string 'Bus'.

name: Riley's School Bus LLC
officers: Kevin Riley (current owner); Glenn & Helen Riley (prior owners); originally founded by Clarence 'Cookie' Krattenmaker
entity_status: Active (Willmar Lakes Area Chamber member; per chamber 'Riley School Bus LLC' is the LLC name)
registry_source: Willmar Lakes Area Chamber of Commerce (entity listed as Riley School Bus LLC); Minnesota SOS search portal not directly accessible to retrieve filing date
notes: Best FMCSA match is RILEY BUS SERVICE INC, USDOT 261754, at the same address (302 Main Ave, Murdock MN 56271). The local operating brand 'Riley Bus & Tours' has been at the same location since 1939; Krattenmaker family started the school bus business in 1939, Helen & Glenn Riley bought it in the 1970s, Kevin Riley acquired it in 2007. The Chamber lists the entity as 'Riley School Bus LLC' which appears to be an affiliated/sister LLC operating from the same 302 Main Ave address (likely school-bus operations distinct from the motorcoach Inc.). MCS-150 filed 4/15/2026; annual mileage 162,291. Safety rating effective 4/22/2025.

name: Big 10 Bus
entity_status: Active (per Columbus Area Chamber of Commerce listing)
registry_source: Columbus Area Chamber of Commerce (Nebraska SOS not directly accessible)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'Big 10 Bus', 'Big 10 Bus LLC', or 'Big Ten Bus' searches. Per Columbus Area Chamber, BIG 10 Bus operates 2 vehicles (16-passenger and 34-passenger party buses) associated with Big 10 Sports Bar & Grill at 1616 E 23rd St Suite 101, Columbus, NE 68601 (phone 402-835-4900); input address 1078 3rd St, Columbus, NE 68601 may be a related secondary address. Operates as a party/charter bus for weddings, nights out, corporate events. Not a traditional school-bus operator. Likely too small to require interstate USDOT registration.

name: Downs School Bus LLC
